title: Compound system extensions
description: Per-entry compound lifecycle metadata, written under entry.system.compound

status.description: Lifecycle state of this entry. Transitions handled by the harness retro flow (drain + harvest).

resolved_by.description: Path to scratch/ diff, commit hash, or PR URL that encodes the fix. Set when status moves to encoded.

source.description: Compound producer-side annotation: did the user mutter the friction, or did the agent observe it itself? Compound-only field; minih retros default to source=agent-self when imported.
